routes.title: Server Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A computer or program that receives requests and provides files, data, or actions to another computer called a client.

routes.title: Web server Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: Hardware and software that accept web requests and return pages, files, or application responses through HTTP.

routes.title: Client Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A device or program—such as a browser—that requests information or actions from a server.

routes.title: Browser Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: Software that requests web resources, interprets them, and presents an interactive page to a visitor.

routes.title: Domain name Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A human-readable name used to reach internet services, controlled through registration and DNS rather than by the website files themselves.

routes.title: DNS Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: The distributed naming system that directs a domain to website, email, verification, and other internet services.

routes.title: Nameserver Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A DNS server that answers questions about names; authoritative nameservers provide the final records for a domain's zone.

routes.title: DNS record Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A typed instruction in DNS that directs traffic or publishes information for a domain or hostname.

routes.title: Hosting Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: The service and infrastructure that make website files or application responses available to internet visitors.

routes.title: Static site Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A website whose deployable pages and assets are prepared ahead of requests instead of requiring server code for every visit.

routes.title: CDN Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A distributed network that serves cached website resources from locations closer to visitors.

routes.title: HTTP Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: The request-and-response protocol browsers, servers, and many APIs use to exchange web resources and actions.

routes.title: TLS Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: The security protocol used by HTTPS to protect data while it travels between a client and server.

routes.title: URL Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: An address that identifies a resource by scheme, host, path, and optional query or fragment information.

routes.title: Redirect Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A response that tells a browser or crawler to request a resource at a different URL.

routes.title: Responsive design Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A layout approach that adapts content and interaction to different screen sizes, zoom levels, input methods, and available space.

routes.title: Git Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A version-control system that records changes to files so work can be compared, reviewed, branched, and restored.

routes.title: GitHub Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A hosted platform for Git repositories, code review, permissions, documentation, automation, releases, and related project operations.

routes.title: Repository Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A project container holding files, revision history, branches, and collaboration records.

routes.title: Branch Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A parallel line of repository work used to develop or review changes without immediately altering the main version.

routes.title: Commit Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A recorded repository revision that identifies a specific set of changes and its place in project history.

routes.title: Deployment Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: The controlled process that makes a selected version of source available in a hosting environment.

routes.title: CI/CD Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: Automated checks and release workflows that turn reviewed source changes into tested, deployable versions.

routes.title: API Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A defined way for one program to request data or actions from another program.

routes.title: API key Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A credential-like string used by an API to associate a request with a project, quota, or permitted capability.

routes.title: OAuth Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A delegated authorization framework that lets a user grant limited application access without giving the application the user's password.

routes.title: Environment variable Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: Runtime configuration supplied outside application source, commonly used for environment-specific values and secret references.

routes.title: Webhook Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: An event-driven HTTP message one system sends to another when something changes.

routes.title: JSON Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A structured text format commonly used to exchange named values, lists, and objects between software systems.

routes.title: Automation Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A repeatable process performed by software according to defined triggers, inputs, rules, permissions, and review points.

routes.title: Model Context Protocol Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A client-server protocol that lets AI applications discover approved tools, resources, and prompt templates through defined connections.

routes.title: MCP server Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A program that exposes a defined set of MCP tools, resources, or prompts to an approved MCP client.

routes.title: MCP client Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: The protocol component inside an AI host that maintains a connection to one MCP server.

routes.title: MCP tool Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: An executable function an MCP server advertises for the client to request with defined inputs and outputs.

routes.title: MCP resource Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: Contextual data an MCP server makes readable through an addressable resource interface.

routes.title: Web crawling Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: Automated retrieval and traversal of web resources to inspect, index, monitor, or analyze publicly reachable content.

routes.title: Crawler Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: An automated client that requests web resources and may follow links according to a defined purpose and policy.

routes.title: robots.txt Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A top-level text file that publishes crawl rules for automated clients following the Robots Exclusion Protocol.

routes.title: XML sitemap Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A machine-readable list of canonical URLs a site wants eligible crawlers to discover.

routes.title: Indexing Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A search system's process of evaluating and storing information about a page for possible retrieval in results.

routes.title: Google Analytics Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: Google's event-based analytics product for measuring configured website or application activity and reporting it through an interface and APIs.

routes.title: Event Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A defined action or occurrence recorded by an analytics system with approved contextual properties.

routes.title: Conversion Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A visitor action the business has deliberately defined as meaningful progress toward an outcome.

routes.title: Google Search Console Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: Google's owner-facing service for monitoring and debugging how a verified website appears and performs in Google Search.

routes.title: Google Business Profile Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A Google-managed business listing that can appear across Google Search and Maps with approved business information and interactions.

routes.title: SEO Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: Work that improves how search systems can access, understand, and present useful website information without guaranteeing placement.

routes.title: Local SEO Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: SEO focused on helping an eligible business become easier to find, understand, and evaluate in a real local market.

routes.title: Technical SEO Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: The technical work that helps the right website pages remain accessible, crawlable, indexable, canonical, fast, and correctly connected.

routes.title: Analytics Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: The collection and interpretation of defined data to answer questions about behavior, performance, and business decisions.

routes.title: Metadata Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: Structured information describing a page or resource, including titles, descriptions, canonical references, and social-sharing fields.

routes.title: Canonical URL Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: The preferred URL identified for a page when the same or closely related content can be reached through multiple URLs.

routes.title: Structured data Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: Machine-readable fields that describe visible entities and content using an agreed vocabulary and supported format.

routes.title: CMS Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: Software used to create, organize, edit, and publish website content without manually changing every delivered file.

routes.title: Cache Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A stored reusable copy that can answer a request faster than recreating or retrieving the original resource again.

routes.title: Website clarity Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: How quickly a visitor can understand what a business offers, who it serves, why it matters, and what to do next.

routes.title: Trust signal Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A specific, checkable detail that reduces uncertainty about a business, its offer, its process, or the next step.

routes.title: Customer discovery Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: The paths customers use to find and begin evaluating a business, service, product, or answer.

routes.title: Customer action Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A useful next step a customer takes, such as calling, requesting a quote, booking, visiting, buying, or making a qualified inquiry.

routes.title: Call to action Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A clear invitation that tells a visitor which useful action they can take next.

routes.title: Search intent Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: The underlying task or decision a person is trying to complete when they enter a search query.

routes.title: Keyword Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A word or phrase used to describe a search topic; actual search queries provide the more precise observed wording.

routes.title: Domain registrar Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A company authorized to register domain names and maintain the registrant's account and renewal relationship.

routes.title: Website backup Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A recoverable copy of website source, content, data, configuration, and other state needed to restore service.

routes.title: SSL certificate Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A digital certificate used during TLS to authenticate a website name and establish an encrypted connection.

routes.title: Dynamic website Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A website that generates or changes responses using application logic, stored data, user state, or external services.

routes.title: HTML Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: The markup language that gives a web page its content structure and meaning.

routes.title: Web form Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: An interface that lets a visitor submit structured information or request an action.

routes.title: Accessibility Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: The practice of making websites perceivable, operable, understandable, and robust for people with varied abilities and technologies.

routes.title: Web performance Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: How quickly and reliably a website loads, renders, responds, and remains stable for real visitors.

routes.title: Internal link Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A link from one page on a website to another page on the same website.

routes.title: Landing page Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A page designed as the arrival point for a specific audience, campaign, query, offer, or next action.

routes.title: Service page Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A page that explains a distinct service, who it is for, the problem it addresses, and the appropriate next action.

routes.title: Location page Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A page that provides useful, location-specific information for a real service area, office, shop, or market.

routes.title: Version control Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A system for recording changes to files so work can be compared, attributed, combined, and restored.

routes.title: Build Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: The process that transforms source files and dependencies into output that can be tested or deployed.

routes.title: Production environment Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: The live environment that serves real visitors or supports real business operations.

routes.title: Staging environment Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A non-production environment used to review and test a release candidate before it reaches real visitors.

routes.title: Rollback Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A controlled way to restore a known prior state after a release causes unacceptable problems.

routes.title: Database Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: An organized system for storing and retrieving structured information used by an application or workflow.

routes.title: Integration Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A maintained connection that lets separate systems exchange data, events, or actions.

routes.title: API endpoint Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A specific address and operation exposed by an API for requesting data or performing an action.

routes.title: Authentication Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: The process of verifying that a person, service, or device is the identity it claims to be.

routes.title: Authorization Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: The rules and decisions that determine which resources or actions an authenticated identity may use.

routes.title: Credential Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: Information or a cryptographic object presented to establish identity or access a protected system.

routes.title: Two-factor authentication Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: Authentication that requires evidence from more than one independent factor category.

routes.title: Workflow Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A defined sequence of actions, decisions, handoffs, and states used to complete a repeatable piece of work.

routes.title: Monitoring Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: Repeated observation of a system's availability, behavior, errors, or business signals so failures can be detected.

routes.title: Lead Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A person or organization that has shown identifiable interest and may have a relevant business need.

routes.title: Lead generation Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: The coordinated process of attracting, informing, capturing, routing, and following up with potential customers.

routes.title: Qualified lead Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A lead that meets agreed criteria for relevance, need, authority, timing, location, or commercial fit.

routes.title: Conversion rate Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: The share of an explicitly defined population that completed an explicitly defined conversion.

routes.title: Metric Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A defined quantitative measure used to observe behavior, condition, progress, or outcome.

routes.title: Vanity metrics Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: Vanity metrics are numbers that look impressive without helping a team make better decisions.

routes.title: First-party data Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: Data a business collects through its own direct relationships, properties, and interactions.

routes.title: Cookie Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A small piece of data a website asks a browser to store and send with later matching requests.

routes.title: Consent management Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: The process and controls used to request, record, honor, and update a person's choices about data use.

routes.title: Personal data Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: Information that identifies, relates to, or can reasonably be connected with a person, depending on context and jurisdiction.

routes.title: Data retention Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: The rules and practices that determine how long data is kept and what happens when it is no longer needed.

routes.title: Backlink Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A link from a page on another website to a page on the business's website.

routes.title: Local citation Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: An online mention or listing of a business's identifying details on a directory, platform, association, or other site.

routes.title: NAP consistency Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: The practice of keeping a business's name, address, and phone information accurate and logically consistent across important listings.

routes.title: AI agent Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A software system that uses an AI model to interpret context, choose steps, and act through bounded tools or workflows.

routes.title: Large language model Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A machine-learning model trained to process and generate language by predicting likely sequences from context.

routes.title: Prompt Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: Instructions and context supplied to a language model to shape the task and response.

routes.title: Platform Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A product or managed environment that provides reusable capabilities other websites, tools, or workflows can run on or connect to.

routes.title: Website architecture Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: The organized relationship among a website's pages, URLs, navigation, internal links, templates, and content types.

routes.title: Dashboard Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A consolidated view that presents selected metrics, events, statuses, or alerts for a defined decision or operating task.

routes.title: Baseline Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A recorded starting state used to compare what changed after an intervention, release, or measurement period.

routes.title: Source code Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: Human-readable instructions and related files used to build, configure, or operate software.

routes.title: Codebase Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: The complete body of source files and related project material that make up a particular software system.

routes.title: Cutover Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: The controlled point when users, traffic, or operations move from the previous system to the replacement.

routes.title: HTTP status code Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A three-digit number in an HTTP response that describes the outcome of a request.

routes.title: 404 Not Found Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: The HTTP response used when the server cannot find the requested resource.

routes.title: 301 redirect Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: An HTTP redirect status indicating that a resource has moved permanently to another URL.

routes.title: Domain registration Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: The time-limited registration of a domain name through an accredited registrar for an identified registrant.

routes.title: Cloudflare Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A third-party internet-infrastructure provider whose services include DNS, traffic proxying, content delivery, hosting, security, and data products.

routes.title: Cloudflare Turnstile Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: Cloudflare's third-party challenge service for assessing whether a website request appears automated or abusive.

routes.title: Cloudflare D1 Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: Cloudflare's managed serverless SQL database product, built around SQLite-compatible semantics and application bindings or APIs.

routes.title: Umami Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: An open-source web-analytics application that reports configured page views and events through dashboards and an API.

routes.title: SSH Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: An encrypted protocol used for authenticated remote login and other secure network services.

routes.title: Artificial intelligence Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A broad category of computer systems that perform tasks associated with prediction, classification, generation, planning, or decision support.

routes.title: WCAG 2.2 AA Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A Level AA conformance target within the W3C Web Content Accessibility Guidelines 2.2.

routes.title: Assistive technology Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: Hardware or software that helps a person perceive, navigate, operate, or communicate through a digital interface.

routes.title: B2B Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: Commercial activity in which the primary buyer is another business or organization rather than an individual consumer.

routes.title: FAQ Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A page or section that answers recurring user questions in a structured, scannable form.

routes.title: IP address Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A network address used to route traffic to or from a device or service.

routes.title: User agent Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: Information a client sends with a web request describing its software and sometimes device or platform characteristics.

routes.title: Do Not Track Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A browser preference signal asking sites not to track the user's activity.

routes.title: Browser storage Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: Data a website stores in a browser for state, preferences, sessions, or application behavior.

routes.title: Page view Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: An analytics record that a page was loaded or displayed under a configured tracking definition.

routes.title: Request log Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A server or delivery-platform record describing requests it received and the responses it produced.

routes.title: Form endpoint Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: The server-side destination that receives and handles a web-form submission.

routes.title: Crawlability Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: The practical ability of permitted crawlers to request and traverse a page or website.

routes.title: Indexability Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A page's technical eligibility to be considered for a search index.

routes.title: Robots directive Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: An instruction telling compliant crawlers whether content may be indexed or links followed.

routes.title: Redirect chain Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A sequence in which one URL redirects to another URL that redirects again before the final response.

routes.title: Orphaned page Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A page with no ordinary internal links pointing to it from the website.

routes.title: Website plugin Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: An add-on that extends a website platform or content-management system with additional behavior.

routes.title: Title tag Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: The HTML document title browsers and search systems use to label a page in tabs, bookmarks, and often search results.

routes.title: Attribution model Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A rule set for assigning credit for a conversion or outcome across marketing or customer touchpoints.

routes.title: Website tracking Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: Configured collection of website interactions or technical signals for measurement, diagnostics, or attribution.

routes.title: Data normalization Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: Transforming data from different sources into consistent names, types, units, and structures.

routes.title: Topic cluster Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A group of related pages organized around a central subject and connected through deliberate internal links.

routes.title: Open-source software Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: Software whose source is available under a license permitting specified forms of use, inspection, modification, and redistribution.

routes.title: MIT License Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A permissive open-source license allowing broad reuse while requiring preservation of its copyright and license notice.

routes.title: Self-hosted Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: Software operated on infrastructure controlled by the user or organization instead of only through a vendor-managed service.

routes.title: Least privilege Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: The practice of granting only the access needed for a defined task, system, and period.

routes.title: Search property Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A verified website or URL scope represented as a managed property in a search-platform account.

routes.title: Call tracking Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: Measurement that connects phone calls to a source, page, campaign, or customer path under a defined configuration.

routes.title: Cascading Style Sheets (CSS) Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A stylesheet language that controls how structured web documents are presented across screens, print, speech, and other media.

routes.title: Magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A non-ionizing medical-imaging method that uses strong magnetic fields, radiofrequency energy, and measured signals to construct detailed images.

routes.title: Functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI) Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: A specialized MRI method that estimates changes associated with brain activity through time-varying blood-flow or blood-oxygenation signals.

routes.title: Ordinary differential equation (ODE) Definition | Boho Digital Services
routes.description: An equation relating a function of one independent variable to one or more of that function's derivatives.
